Standard Android SharedPreferences path structure confirmed via Android developer documentation. Pattern verified: /data/data/{PACKAGE_NAME}/shared_prefs/{PACKAGE_NAME}_preferences.xml. Avare app package name is com.ds.avare.

privileged_info_summary: The preferences file path is stored in the standard Android SharedPreferences location for the Avare app at /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml. The task involves configuring traffic alert settings through the Avare app's UI. Avare does support traffic alert features including Audible Traffic Alerts and ADSB Traffic Filtering with configurable distance and height parameters. However, the specific values of 5 miles for distance and 1500 feet for height could not be verified against official Avare documentation or source code - these appear to be arbitrary test values for this synthetic task.
